roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING BEFORE JUDGE VICTOR HWANG IN DEPT 13/TEXT:CONFLCNSL APPTD/X:CONFLICT COUNSEL JOHN KAMAN IS APPOINTED TO REPRESENT A WITNESS IN THIS PRELIMINARY HEARING,/X:  CONFLICT COUNSEL, FOR THE WITNESS, REQUESTS MORE TIME TO SPEAK WITH HIS CLIENT,/LDPX: 03-05-19/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA, AND COUNSEL/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER/NTW60/LDPX:03-05-19/987,2/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/ORMS/DOP/X:ASA CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSDEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO NOT CONSUME ALCOHOL/
